text:
There once was an old owl. An owl old!

Every morning she fluttered around. She fluttered just sweetly.

She knew little birds loved sweets.

She liked sweets. Quite.

She’d gobble them up. She’d think.

Ooooh! There just.

She thought!

Maybe there.

Maybe sweet things would fall!

She fluttered hard.

Fly away!

Some did.

She ate.

Cookies! So yum!

Now look!

There’s one.

So tasty!

Take.

She just could!

She held tight.

I’ll chase.

You silly bird!

I’ll eat you!

There you go!

She ate.

That’s okay.

I’ll sing.

That’s my way!

Fly bird!

That’s!

Now I know.

I’ve flown.

Owl girl now.

Just me. That'll prove.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
